requirement.permission: You don't have the needed permissions to run this command!

subcommand.invalid: Invalid subcommand. Try one of the following options: `$previousCmd <$cmdlist>`

command.suggestion: Did you mean {{command}}? (Type {{acceptCommand}} to run this)

help.pageStructure:
Available Commands (page $currPage/$maxPage): 

$content

Run `$prefix$helpCmd <command>` to learn more about it. You can also include subcommands.
For example: `$prefix$helpCmd settings get`

Tip: Use the arrows beneath this message to turn pages, or specify the required page by using `$prefix$helpCmd <page number>`

cmdHandler.invalidFlag:
Invalid flag `$invalidFlag`. It doesn't match any options on this command.
`$previousCmd $invalidFlag`

page.invalid: {{number}} is not a valid page number!

permissions.message: Please grant me the {{permission}} permission in {{channel}} or contact a server administrator. I am unable to operate without this.

commands.clear: Remove all songs from the queue.
commands.debug: A debug command for various purposes.
commands.filter: Open an interactive filter picker — react with an emoji to apply an audio effect.
commands.forceleave: Make Remix leave a channel even if you're not in it.
commands.invite: Get the invite link for Remix and the support server.
commands.join: Make the bot join your voice channel, or specify one.
commands.leave: Make the bot leave your current voice channel.
commands.list: List the songs in the queue of your current voice channel.
commands.loop: Toggle the looping of your queue/song.
commands.np: Request the name and url of the currently playing song.
commands.pause: Pause the playback in your voice channel.
commands.play:
Play a song or playlist from a URL or search query.
Supports YouTube, Spotify, SoundCloud, Deezer, Apple Music, Tidal, and more.
Default search: YouTube Music. Use `-p <provider>` or inline prefix e.g. `sp: blinding lights`.
commands.player: Create an interactive player control panel with live progress.
commands.playnext: Same as %play but adds the result to the top of the queue.
commands.radio: Play a radio station. Use `%radio list` to browse all stations.
commands.reload: Reload commands, src modules, or audio modules. Leave blank to see all targets.
commands.remove: Remove a specific song from the queue.
commands.resume: Resume the playback in your voice channel.
commands.search:
Display search results for a query and pick one to play.
Supports all providers — use inline prefix e.g. `sp: song` or `-p dz`.
commands.servers: Fetch a list of servers the bot is in.
commands.settings: Change/Get settings in the current server.
commands.stats: Display stats about the bot like the uptime.
commands.support: The support server for Remix. Feel free to ask help, report bugs or just chat :)
commands.test: Shows how many people are in each voice channel.
commands.thumbnail: Request the thumbnail of the currently playing song.
commands.volume: Get or change the current volume.
commands.volumedefault: View or set the server default volume. (Requires Manage Server to set)

debug.target: The target that should be examined.

forceleave.channelId: The channel that should be left.

join.channel: A voice channel mention, ID, or name to join. Defaults to your current channel.

loop.type: Specifies what loop should be toggled.

play.query: A search query, URL, or provider-prefixed query like `sp: song name`.
play.provider: The search provider. Default: YouTube Music. Or use inline prefix: sp:, dz:, am:, yt:, sc: etc.

playnext.query: A search query, URL, or provider-prefixed query like `sp: song name`.
playnext.provider: The search provider. Default: YouTube Music.

radio.station: Station name, 'list' to browse, or leave blank for default.

reload.target: Command/module name, or: all | commands | src | audio

remove.index: The position of the song in the queue. You can view the indices with the 'list' command.

search.provider: The search provider. Default: YouTube Music.
search.query: The query to search for, or a provider-prefixed query like `sp: song name`.

get.setting: Get the current value of a setting.

set.setting: The name of the setting you want to set.

help.setting: Omit to see all available settings.

volume.volume: The new volume in percentages (e.g. `30` or `100`). If you go above 100% there might be quality loss.

volumedefault.volume: New volume in % (0–200) to save as server default. Leave empty to view current.

embed.sclosedContent:
{{content}}
Session closed - Changing pages **won't work** from here.

perms.messages: I am unable to send messages in {{channel}}. Please contact a server administrator and grant me the "SendMessage" permission.
perms.reactions: I need reaction permissions to work. Please contact a server administrator to address this.

settings.get: Get the value of a specific setting or the settings of the server.
settings.set: Set the value of a specific setting.
settings.reset: Reset a setting to its default value.
settings.help: Show help for the settings system, or explain a specific setting.

error.dc: It doesn't look like we're in the same voice channel.
error.invalid: Invalid voice channel. Please try again and check capitalization! (`x` to cancel)
error.perms: Something went wrong. Unable to join {{channel}}. Do I have the needed permissions?

warning.nc: You don't seem to be connected to {{channel}}. Did you forget to join?

_common.noVoiceStrict: ⚠️ You need to join a voice channel to use this command.
_common.alreadyInChannel: ⚠️ I'm already playing in {{channels}}. Join that channel or use `{{prefix}}play` to start music in your channel.
_common.notInVoice: I'm not in a voice channel.
_common.queueEmpty: 📭 The queue is empty. Use `{{prefix}}play` to add songs!
_common.queueEnded: 🎵 The queue has ended — nothing left to play. Add more songs with `{{prefix}}play`!
_common.notConnected: It doesn't look like we're in the same voice channel.

_common.voiceSelectionInvalid: Invalid voice channel. Try again or type `x`.
_common.voiceChannelRequired: ❌ Please join a **voice channel** first before using this command!

filter.applyFailed:
❌ Failed to apply **{{filter}}**: `{{reason}}`

Make sure your NodeLink node has filters enabled.
filter.pendingCleared: Filter cleared. Original audio will be used on the next playable track.
filter.pendingApplied: {{label}} saved. It will apply on the next playable track.
filter.pendingRemoved: {{label}} removed. The next playable track will use the updated filters.
filter.reactToToggle: 💡 React again to toggle, or ❌ to close.
filter.footer: Page {{page}}/{{total}} • React with a filter emoji to toggle it

forceleave.wrongServer: ❌ This command has to be run in the same server as the voice channel.

invite.title: Invite Remix
invite.description:
Add Remix to your server directly from [FluxerList](<https://fluxerlist.com/bots/remix>).

Join our community at [fluxer.gg/remix](https://fluxer.gg/remix) for support, updates, and direct feedback.

join.channelNotFound:
Couldn't find the channel `{{channel}}`
Use the help command to learn more about this. (`%help join`)
join.audioNodeConnecting: ⚠️ Audio node is still connecting — please try again in a few seconds.
join.noVoiceChannel: ❌ You're not in a voice channel. Please join one first, or specify a channel: `{{prefix}}join <#channel>`
join.voiceChannelNotFound: ❌ Couldn't find that voice channel. Try using a mention like `<#channelid>` or the exact channel name.
join.autoLeaveInactive247:
Left channel <#{{channel}}> because of inactivity.
If you want me to stay in voice, use `{{prefix}}247 on/auto`

leave.noVoiceChannel: ⚠️ Please join a voice channel first.
leave.notInVoice: I'm not in a voice channel.
leave.joinChannel: ⚠️ Please join {{channel}} to use this command.
leave.multipleChannels:
⚠️ I'm playing in multiple channels! Please join one of them:
{{channels}}
leave.leftRejoin247:
✅ Successfully Left — rejoining <#{{channel}}> in 5 seconds.
To disable 24/7 mode permanently, use `%247 off`.
leave.left247On:
✅ Successfully Left.
ℹ️ 24/7 mode is **on** — bot won't rejoin automatically. Use `%play` to bring it back, or `%247 off` to fully disable.

settings.resetSuccess: 🔄 `{{setting}}` has been reset to its default: {{value}}
settings.volumeRange: ❌ Volume must be a number between **1** and **200**.
settings.invalidLocale:
❌ `{{locale}}` is not a supported locale.
Available locales: {{locales}}
settings.prefixLength: ❌ Prefix must be between **1** and **5** characters.
settings.invalid247:
❌ Invalid value `{{value}}` for 24/7 mode.

**Valid options:**
• `off` — bot leaves after inactivity
• `on` — bot stays active in the saved channel list
• `auto` — bot stays active and keeps the saved channel list ready for recovery
settings.noVoice247: ❌ You're not in a voice channel. Join one first, then run `%247 {{mode}}` again.
settings.247DisabledAll: ✅ 24/7 mode **disabled** for all channels in this server.
settings.247Joined:
✅ 24/7 mode set to **{{mode}}** for <#{{channel}}>. Bot joined!
{{summary}}
settings.247JoinFailed:
✅ 24/7 mode saved for <#{{channel}}>, but failed to join: {{error}}
{{summary}}
settings.helpSubcommands:
**Subcommands:**
• `{{prefix}}settings get` — list all current values
• `{{prefix}}settings get <setting>` — view a single setting
• `{{prefix}}settings set <setting> <value>` — change a setting
• `{{prefix}}settings reset <setting>` — restore default value
• `{{prefix}}settings help <setting>` — describe a setting
settings.shortcutsHint:
Shortcuts: `{{prefix}}247`, `{{prefix}}prefix`
Use `{{prefix}}settings help <setting>` to learn about any setting.

support.title: 💬 Support
support.description:
For anything regarding Remix, head over to our server:
[Remix HQ](https://fluxer.gg/remix)

If you don't want to join, feel free to contact the team members listed in the server.
